query:
-- =============== Tue May 26 (planId 1110003) ================
INSERT INTO dailyPlans (id, date, dayType, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1110003, '2026-05-26', 'half', 'planned', NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO scheduleBlocks (planId, blockType, subjectId, title, description, startTime, durationMin, sortOrder, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(1110003, 'morning_warmup', NULL,  'Slow morning',
 'Tea, parakeets, ducks. Summer pace. No rush.',
 '09:30', 20, 0, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110003, 'math', 30012, 'Math — Spectrum Math Gr 5',
 'One short page. Light math is fine; we are keeping the muscle, not training for marathons.',
 '10:00', 20, 1, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110003, 'adventure', 30014, 'Outdoor / nature',
 'Yard, ducks, creek edge. Notice three things you have not noticed before. Notebook optional.',
 '10:25', 35, 2, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110003, 'read_aloud', 30013, 'Reading — your pick',
 'Tuck Everlasting OR Michael''s World. You choose. Read aloud or read alone, your call.',
 '11:05', 25, 3, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110003, 'choice', NULL, 'Choice block',
 'Whatever you want. Art, drawing, music, animals, makeup, Roblox. Yours.',
 '11:35', 30, 4, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110003, 'catch_up', NULL, 'Cozy wrap-up',
 'Optional. Anything you want to write down or say out loud about today, or just done.',
 '12:10', 10, 5, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW());

-- =============== Thu May 28 (planId 1110004) ================
INSERT INTO dailyPlans (id, date, dayType, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1110004, '2026-05-28', 'half', 'planned', NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO scheduleBlocks (planId, blockType, subjectId, title, description, startTime, durationMin, sortOrder, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(1110004, 'morning_warmup', NULL, 'Slow morning',
 'Tea, parakeets, ducks. No agenda for the first 20 minutes.',
 '09:30', 20, 0, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110004, 'custom', 30013, 'Try one thing on the placement page',
 'Pick ONE skill that looks interesting. Skip is a real button. We are listening for what feels easy and what feels hard.',
 '09:55', 20, 1, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110004, 'adventure', 30014, 'Duck care + nature',
 'Run check, water, the surviving three. Notice what is changing in the yard week-over-week.',
 '10:20', 35, 2, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110004, 'adventure', 30014, 'Spectrum Science Gr 5',
 'One short lesson plus the matching reading. Mom or Grandma scaffolds.',
 '11:00', 25, 3, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110004, 'choice', NULL, 'Choice block',
 'Whatever you want. Yours.',
 '11:30', 30, 4, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110004, 'custom', 30013, '180 Days of Language Gr 5',
 'One page. That is it.',
 '12:05', 15, 5, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()),

(1110004, 'catch_up', NULL, 'Cozy wrap-up',
 'Optional.',
 '12:25', 10, 6, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW());

-- Verify
SELECT dp.id, dp.date, dp.dayType, COUNT(sb.id) AS blocks, SUM(sb.durationMin) AS minutes
FROM dailyPlans dp LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks sb ON sb.planId = dp.id
WHERE dp.id IN (1110003, 1110004)
GROUP BY dp.id, dp.date, dp.dayType
ORDER BY dp.date;
